name: yeshiva-tkoa
description: Монорепо сайта Ешивы «ХаБаД Ткоа» — web (Next), admin (Next+MUI), api (Express+MySQL)

scripts.dev:docker:fast:reset: docker compose -f docker-compose.fast.yml stop && docker volume rm yeshiva-fast_app_workspace
scripts.db:seed:docker:fast: docker compose -f docker-compose.fast.yml exec api pnpm --filter @yeshiva/api db:seed
